fields.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you making this change?
fields.reasonHelp: Required. Captured in the audit log.

confirm.softDeleteBody: This will hide the record. Super-admin can restore later.
confirm.restoreBody: This will make the record active again.
confirm.deactivateUserBody: The user will lose access immediately.
confirm.resetPinBody: Enter a new 6-digit PIN. The user will need to use the new PIN to sign in.

errors.mobileAlreadyExists: Another active record uses this mobile number.
errors.designNumberAlreadyExists: Another active design uses this number.
errors.cannotModifySelf: You cannot change your own role, deactivate yourself, or reset your own PIN.
errors.centreManagerRequiresLocation: Centre managers must cover at least one location.
errors.centreManagerLocationsExist: This centre manager still has locations assigned. Remove them before changing the role.
errors.settingLocked: This setting is locked and cannot be changed from the UI.
errors.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.sessionInvalid: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.invalidInput: Some of the values you entered are not valid.
errors.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.userNotFound: No active user with this mobile
errors.rateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.comingSoon: Jobs and receipts will appear here in the next sessions.

shortcuts.title: Go to
shortcuts.skusHint: Create, browse and print QR labels.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Job-work villages. Read-only for everyone except super-admin.

form.imageHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP. Max 2 MB.

errors.rateRequired: Rate per guss is required and must be greater than 0
errors.imageWrongType: Image must be JPEG, PNG or WebP

form.locationsHint: Pick one or more villages this lead lady serves.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Internal staff who can sign in.

form.pinHint: The user can sign in with this PIN. Super-admin can reset later.
form.locationsHint: Required for centre managers. Pick at least one.

errors.centreManagerLocationsRequired: Centre managers need at least one location

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Business constants. Changes apply to future jobs only — historical jobs stay locked to the values they were issued under.

weight_loss_tolerance_pct.label: Weight loss tolerance (%)
weight_loss_tolerance_pct.help: Soft-flag jobs whose weight loss exceeds this percentage.

dozen_multiplier.label: Dozen multiplier
dozen_multiplier.help: Multiplier for dozen quantity in labour calculation.

sla_days.label: SLA days
sla_days.help: Job-work deadline in days from issue.

incentive_pct.label: Incentive (%)
incentive_pct.help: Lead lady annual incentive as % of total labour.

season_start_month.label: Season start month
season_start_month.help: Calendar month the rakhi season starts.
season_start_month.lockedTooltip: This setting is locked because changing it would invalidate historical incentive calculations. Edit via SQL only if absolutely necessary.

library.title: SKUs
library.subtitle: Sellable packs. Each row is one design at one pack size.
library.searchPlaceholder: Design number, mix code, or name

form.packTypeHint: Select a pack size, or Mix for a multi-design pack.
form.priceHint: Wholesale price per pack. Never printed on the label.
form.photoHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP. Auto-resized to 1024px.
form.previewEmpty: Fill the fields above to see the SKU code and QR.
form.lockedHint: Locked after create — already-printed labels reference these values.

detail.title: SKU detail
detail.deactivateConfirm: Deactivating this SKU hides it from the default library view. Existing printed labels keep scanning. Reactivate later if needed.
detail.reactivateConfirm: This will return the SKU to the active list.

print.title: Print labels
print.subtitle: Pick the SKUs you want, then print from your browser to the sticker sheet.
print.selectedNone: Select one or more SKUs to print.

errors.priceRequired: Price is required and must be 0 or more
errors.photoWrongType: Photo must be JPEG, PNG or WebP
errors.duplicate: A SKU with this design and pack already exists.
